questionHtml: Hence, or otherwise, find the largest number of daylight hours in Taipei during 2021 and the day of the year on which this occurs.
markschemeHtml:
16.2 16.1737… hours on day 173                   A1A1


Note: Accept an answer of “day 172” for the second A1.

 

[2 marks]
